name: Cue Energy Resources Limited
description: Cue Energy Resources Limited is an Australia-based oil and gas exploration and production company. The company has a diversified portfolio of production, development, and exploration assets in Australia, New Zealand, and Indonesia. Its key assets include interests in the Maari oil field in New Zealand, the Sampang and Mahato PSCs in Indonesia, and onshore gas fields in the Amadeus Basin in Australia. Cue Energy is focused on maximizing value from its existing production assets while pursuing growth opportunities through exploration and development.
